name: Plusnet Inc
notes: One of the most growing ISP Network all across Chittagong Region. Plusnet Inc also branded as Plusnet Communication is one of the market leader in Chittagong providing internet solutions as well as broadband internet services through FTTH connections. We have huge subscriber base in Chittagong and has spread our POP's (Points of Presence) all across Chittagong region so that we can provide connectivity at any location in Chittagong Division.
